Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences from the 23-year variety series include archival footage of Julie Andrews, George Carlin, Ella Fitzgerald, Judy Garland, Elvis Presley, and Flip Wilson; host Carol Burnett. At the Ed Sullivan Theatre in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: The Smothers Brothers introduce memorable moments from the variety show of the '60s: comedy, rock, soul; celebrity interviews, impersonators, novelty acts.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary
Video.title: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary
